questionHtml: Explain how it could be determined that B. subtilis is a Gram-positive bacterium.
markschemeHtml:
a. use the Gram staining procedure ✔

b. Gram-positive bacteria take up/retain «crystal violet» stain ✔ 

c. «Gram-positive bacteria» appear purple-coloured seen through a microscope ✔

meta.title: Explain how it could be determined that B. subtilis is a Gram-positive bacterium.
